Create Purchase Order with Local Language for Approved Supplier
description: Create a purchase order with local language for an approved supplier and verify that the system supports the local language requirement.

scenario: Attempt Purchase Order with Local Language for Inactive Supplier
description: Attempt to create a purchase order with local language for an inactive supplier and verify that the system prevents the creation of the purchase order due to the supplier's inactivity.

scenario: Verify Local Language Support for Purchase Order Details
description: Verify that the system supports local language for purchase order details, including supplier name, item description, and quantity.

scenario: Verify Local Language Support for Purchase Order Header
description: Verify that the system supports local language for purchase order header, including order date, supplier name, and order total.

scenario: Verify Local Language Support for Purchase Order Approval
description: Verify that the system supports local language for purchase order approval, including approval comments and approval status.
